flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Florida International University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.0% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Florida International University rose 40% between 2021 and 2024 (42.3% → 59.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Florida International University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (67.1% → 74.4%).
